message:
chore: audit batch 495 — 8 files from cancellation propagation fix + pool fixes

Diff audit of commit 9edd438e (cancellation propagation) and 5c6ea613 (pool fixes):
- mysql.rs, postgres.rs: deferred-finished transaction pattern SOUND
- session.rs: map_send_error Cancelled propagation SOUND
- service/buffer.rs: wake parked poll_ready on close SOUND
- sync/pool.rs: waiter FIFO + cancel cleanup SOUND
- database/pool.rs: narrow mutex scope SOUND
- messaging/fabric.rs: decision_records 10k cap SOUND
- sync/mutex.rs: deadlock test rewrite SOUND

Close bead 1qfd0.493 (already fixed in 9edd438e).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
